reviews.comment:
0.30 hs del miércoles 16/1/19. Un desastre. Lleno de borrachos, indigentes y hasta una loca que daba miedo. Un tipo durmiendo en los sillones del bar. Fui por un café. No vuelvo nunca más. Parecía tierra de nadie. El de seguridad, como siempre sin hacer nada.

(Translated by Google)
12:30 a.m. Wednesday, January 16, 2019. A disaster. Full of drunks, homeless people, and even a scary crazy woman. A guy was sleeping on the bar chairs. I went for a coffee. I'll never go back. It felt like a no-man's-land. The security guard, as always, was doing nothing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJX2FiQjV3RRAB
